LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE AUG-09-2024 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE, N.A.'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF'S UNOPPOSED "MOTION TO SET ASIDE AND VACATE DEFAULT JUDGMENT; DISMISSING WITH PREJUDICE" [CCP 473] IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: V. calendar.matters:
MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Oct-09-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE, N.A.'s MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to set aside and vacate default judgment; dismissing with prejudice" [CCP 473] is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
